flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 32% at Pacific Union College vs the 2004–2008 baseline (910 vs 1.3k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Pacific Union College rose 18% between 2007 and 2010 ($21.4k → $25.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Pacific Union College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($32.1k → $37.2k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Pacific Union College rose 14% between 2007 and 2010 ($10.5k → $12.0k).
